title: Change of His Majesty’s Ambassador to Peru: Su-Lin Garbett-Shiels
body: "Mrs Su-Lin Garbett-Shiels has been appointed His Majesty’s Ambassador to the Republic of Peru in succession to Mr Gavin Cook who will be transferring to another Diplomatic Service appointment.  Mrs Garbett-Shiels will take up her appointment during January 2026.  Curriculum vitae  Full name: Su-Lin Garbett-Shiels     Year Role     2025 Full-time language training (Spanish)   2022 to 2025 FCDO, Head, Crisis Management Department   2021 to 2022 FCDO, Head, International Human Resources Department   2020 to 2021 DFID/FCO, Head, Covid Corporate Response   2018 to 2020 DFID, Deputy Head, Country Programmes Cabinet   2015 to 2018 Jakarta, Deputy Head of the UK Climate Change Unit and DFID Indonesia   2010 to 2015 DFID, Climate and Environment Advisor in Adaptation, Philippines Typhoon Reconstruction, and International Teams   2007 to 2009 Department of Energy and Climate Change, Economic Advisor, Stern Review Team, International Climate Change Directorate   2006 to 2007 HM Treasury, Private Secretary to Lord Stern, Chief Economist and Head of the Stern Review on the Economics of Climate Change   2003 to 2005 HM Treasury, Assistant Economist, Economic Analysis teams   2003 Joined HM Treasury      Media enquiries     Email newsdesk@fcdo.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7008 3100    Email the FCDO Newsdesk (monitored 24 hours a day) in the first instance, and we will respond as soon as possible.   "
